mapper.select: SELECT S.STAFF_ID, S.STAFF_NO, S.STAFF_NM, S.STAFF_CLS, C1.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_CLS_NAME, S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS, C2.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_SALESSTATUS_NAME, S.STAFF_SEX, S.STAFF_RMK1, S.STAFF_CRD_DT, S.STAFF_UPD_DT FROM STAFF_TBL S LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C1 ON S.STAFF_CLS = C1.COM_CD AND C1.COM_ID = 'STAFF_CLS' LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C2 ON S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS = C2.COM_CD AND C2.COM_ID = 'STAFF_SALESSTATUS' ORDER BY S.STAFF_NO
SELECT COM_CD, COM_CONTENT_1 FROM COM_TBL WHERE COM_ID = 'STAFF_CLS' ORDER BY COM_CD
SELECT COM_CD, COM_CONTENT_1 FROM COM_TBL WHERE COM_ID = 'STAFF_SALESSTATUS' ORDER BY COM_CD

SELECT S.STAFF_ID, S.STAFF_NO, S.STAFF_NM, S.STAFF_CLS, C1.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_CLS_NAME, S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS, C2.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_SALESSTATUS_NAME, S.STAFF_SEX, S.STAFF_RMK1, S.STAFF_CRD_DT, S.STAFF_UPD_DT FROM STAFF_TBL S LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C1 ON S.STAFF_CLS = C1.COM_CD AND C1.COM_ID = 'STAFF_CLS' LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C2 ON S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS = C2.COM_CD AND C2.COM_ID = 'STAFF_SALESSTATUS' WHERE S.STAFF_ID = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STAFF_TBL ( STAFF_NO, STAFF_NM, STAFF_KN, STAFF_ALPHABET, STAFF_SEX, STAFF_COUNTRY, STAFF_BIRTHPLACE, STAFF_CLS, STAFF_COMPANY, STAFF_POSTNO, STAFF_ADDRESS, STAFF_BIRTHDT, STAFF_AGE, STAFF_MAIL, STAFF_PHONENO, STAFF_EMERGENCYCALL, STAFF_NEARESTSTATION, STAFF_SALESSTATUS, STAFF_POST, STAFF_GROUP, STAFF_MYNO, STAFF_RESIDENCECARD, STAFF_RESTYPE, STAFF_CARDENDDT, STAFF_PHOTO, STAFF_INSURANCENO, STAFF_INSURANCETYPE, STAFF_RESUME, STAFF_RMK1, STAFF_RMK2, STAFF_INDT, STAFF_OUTDT, STAFF_CRD_USR, STAFF_CRD_DT, STAFF_UPD_USR, STAFF_UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{staffNo}, #{staffNm}, #{staffKn}, #{staffAlphabet}, #{staffSex}, #{staffCountry}, #{staffBirthplace}, #{staffCls}, #{staffCompany}, #{staffPostno}, #{staffAddress}, #{staffBirthdt}, #{staffAge}, #{staffMail}, #{staffPhoneno}, #{staffEmergencycall}, #{staffNeareststation}, #{staffSalesstatus}, #{staffPost}, #{staffGroup}, #{staffMyno}, #{staffResidencecard}, #{staffRestype}, #{staffCardenddt}, #{staffPhoto}, #{staffInsuranceno}, #{staffInsurancetype}, #{staffResume}, #{staffRmk1}, #{staffRmk2}, #{staffIndt}, #{staffOutdt}, 'system', NOW(), 'system', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE STAFF_TBL SET STAFF_NO = #{staffNo}, STAFF_NM = #{staffNm}, STAFF_KN = #{staffKn}, STAFF_ALPHABET = #{staffAlphabet}, STAFF_SEX = #{staffSex}, STAFF_COUNTRY = #{staffCountry}, STAFF_BIRTHPLACE = #{staffBirthplace}, STAFF_CLS = #{staffCls}, STAFF_COMPANY = #{staffCompany}, STAFF_POSTNO = #{staffPostno}, STAFF_ADDRESS = #{staffAddress}, STAFF_BIRTHDT = #{staffBirthdt}, STAFF_AGE = #{staffAge}, STAFF_MAIL = #{staffMail}, STAFF_PHONENO = #{staffPhoneno}, STAFF_EMERGENCYCALL = #{staffEmergencycall}, STAFF_NEARESTSTATION = #{staffNeareststation}, STAFF_SALESSTATUS = #{staffSalesstatus}, STAFF_POST = #{staffPost}, STAFF_GROUP = #{staffGroup}, STAFF_MYNO = #{staffMyno}, STAFF_RESIDENCECARD = #{staffResidencecard}, STAFF_RESTYPE = #{staffRestype}, STAFF_CARDENDDT = #{staffCardenddt}, STAFF_PHOTO = #{staffPhoto}, STAFF_INSURANCENO = #{staffInsuranceno}, STAFF_INSURANCETYPE = #{staffInsurancetype}, STAFF_RESUME = #{staffResume}, STAFF_RMK1 = #{staffRmk1}, STAFF_RMK2 = #{staffRmk2}, STAFF_INDT = #{staffIndt}, STAFF_OUTDT = #{staffOutdt}, STAFF_UPD_USR = 'system', STAFF_UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE STAFF_ID = #{staffId}
mapper.select: SELECT S.STAFF_ID, S.STAFF_NO, S.STAFF_NM, S.STAFF_KN, S.STAFF_ALPHABET, S.STAFF_SEX, S.STAFF_COUNTRY, S.STAFF_BIRTHPLACE, S.STAFF_CLS, C1.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_CLS_NAME, S.STAFF_COMPANY, S.STAFF_POSTNO, S.STAFF_ADDRESS, S.STAFF_BIRTHDT, S.STAFF_AGE, S.STAFF_MAIL, S.STAFF_PHONENO, S.STAFF_EMERGENCYCALL, S.STAFF_NEARESTSTATION, S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS, C2.COM_CONTENT_1 AS STAFF_SALESSTATUS_NAME, S.STAFF_POST, S.STAFF_GROUP, S.STAFF_MYNO, S.STAFF_RESIDENCECARD, S.STAFF_RESTYPE, S.STAFF_CARDENDDT, S.STAFF_PHOTO, S.STAFF_INSURANCENO, S.STAFF_INSURANCETYPE, S.STAFF_RESUME, S.STAFF_RMK1, S.STAFF_RMK2, S.STAFF_INDT, S.STAFF_OUTDT, S.STAFF_CRD_DT, S.STAFF_CRD_USR, S.STAFF_UPD_USR, S.STAFF_UPD_DT FROM STAFF_TBL S LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C1 ON S.STAFF_CLS = C1.COM_CD AND C1.COM_ID = 'STAFF_CLS' LEFT JOIN COM_TBL C2 ON S.STAFF_SALESSTATUS = C2.COM_CD AND C2.COM_ID = 'STAFF_SALESSTATUS' WHERE S.STAFF_ID = #{staffId}
SELECT MAX(STAFF_NO) FROM STAFF_TBL WHERE STAFF_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{datePart}, '%')
